title: Verify user can successfully register with valid email and password
description: Test that a new user can create an account with valid email and a password meeting all security criteria
preconditions: No account with the test email exists

steps.description: 3. Enter password meeting all criteria: Minimum 8 characters, uppercase, lowercase, number, special char
4. Enter same password in confirm password field

expected_result: Registration successful, verification email sent, user_id returned in response
